headline: Robust Recurring Revenue Affirms Trimble Inc. (TRMB) as a Stock That Could 10x by 2030
summary: Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) is one of the stocks that could 10x by 2030. On May 6, Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) delivered impressive first-quarter results characterized by record recurring revenue and gross margins, and provided solid guidance for 2026. The impressive first-quarter results came against the backdrop of the Connect & Scale strategy, which is helping the […]
